---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for NYRA Desktop
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Problem Statement

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe the problem you're trying to solve.

Example: "I'm always frustrated when..."

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Describe the feature in terms of user workflows and benefits.

## Alternative Solutions

Have you considered other ways to solve this problem? Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Example Use Case

Provide a specific example of how this feature would be used:

1. User does X
2. System does Y
3. User achieves Z

## Implementation Details (Optional)

If you have ideas about implementation, describe them here:
- Technical approach
- Affected components
- API changes needed
- UI/UX considerations

## Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here, such as:
- Related features in other tools
- Priority level (nice-to-have, important, critical)
- Affected user personas
- Performance considerations

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched existing issues and found no duplicates
- [ ] This feature aligns with NYRA's vision and roadmap
- [ ] I have considered the impact on existing functionality
- [ ] This feature benefits more than just a single use case
